title: Misanteca puchury-major

Misanteca puchury-major is a type of evergreen tree or shrub that is commonly found in tropical regions. The classification of Misanteca puchury-major places it within the family Annonaceae, which comprises over 2,000 species of plants. Misanteca puchury-major is closely related to other species within the genus Misanteca, which is characterized by its distinctive fruit and leaf morphology.
